answer: On 2026-09-15, `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id`, which fanned out Florida purchase escrow disbursements across multiple buyer and seller roles and overstated `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`. The fix is to use `closing_party_role_id` and backfill Florida purchase closings.

facts.affected_segment: florida purchase closings for fnf national title
facts.remediation: switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins, and backfill Florida purchase closings
